$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C16 2026-07-18): RUN witness for the 2 Tcl functions added to tcl.json to clear test_func's last blockers -- Tcl_AppendStringsToObj (variadic void Tcl_AppendStringsToObj(Tcl_Obj*, ...); a NULL-terminated char* list appended to the obj) + Tcl_NewDoubleObj (Tcl_Obj *Tcl_NewDoubleObj(double)). Both are exported libtcl8.6 functions; adding them takes test_func fully CLEAN (32->33; its only errors were S0001 on these two). AppendCmd (libtcl calls it back on the eval) builds "40" by appending "4","0",NULL via Tcl_AppendStringsToObj then parses it to 40 (Tcl_GetIntFromObj), and makes a 2.0 via Tcl_NewDoubleObj read back as 2 (Tcl_GetDoubleFromObj) -> 40+2 = 42, value-divergent over Tcl_Obj values libtcl round-tripped. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 runs it (libtcl8.6). RED-ON-DISABLE: remove Tcl_AppendStringsToObj or Tcl_NewDoubleObj from tcl.json -> S0001 -> stops compiling.
